Hero.description: I build scalable, real-time, and data-driven systems — from multi-tenant SaaS platforms to tools that blend software with <ai>AI</ai> in practical ways.

Sections.workBody: Case studies are on the way — real-time platforms, multi-tenant SaaS, and AI tooling.
Sections.aboutBody: Four years across streaming, audit, and AI products. The full story lands here next.
Sections.contactBody: A contact form with real delivery is coming. For now, the footer links work.
